channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Allahu Akbar!' UK Terrorism Police Investigate Stabbings at London School by... 13-Year-Old Boy
Trump on Iran: Told Netanyahu Diplomatic Outcome Preferred
item.description: President Donald Trump said he had a "very good" meeting with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Wednesday, adding that the only definitive ...

item.title: Report: Rep. Neal Dunn to Retire Early, Shrinking GOP Majority
item.description: Rep. Neal Dunn, R-Fla., is reportedly preparing to announce an early retirement next week - a development that could further complicate life for House...

item.title: JD Vance Has Choice Advice for America-Bashing Olympians: 'You're Not There to Pop Off About Politics'
Trump Religious Liberty Commission boots member after contentious antisemitism hearing
item.description: President Donald Trump's Religious Liberty Commission removed Catholic activist after controversial antisemitism hearing.

item.title: New: San Francisco Sued Over Reparations Ordinance
Army Signs $5.2M Deal for New Counter-Drone System
item.description: American troops facing the growing threat of drone swarms on future battlefields will soon have a new defensive weapon: a small, low-cost interceptor ...

item.title: Wowsers: More Info on Man Detained in Guthrie Case, and Wild Interviews With Him and His Mother-in-Law
California Fuel Prices Poised to Hit New Heights Due to Refinery Losses
Lawyer for Dem Legislator Warns Pirro After Grand Jury Rejects Indictment
item.description: A lawyer for Rep. Jason Crow, D-Colo., warned U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro in a letter on Wednesday that her office could face legal consequences if it...

item.title: NYPD Seeks OK From Trump Admin to Down Drones
item.description: The New York Police Department is urging the Trump administration to grant it authority to disable drones over the nation's largest city, warning that...

item.title: Republican lawmaker's early retirement rumors send shockwaves through House GOP
item.description: House Republican Rep. Neal Dunn of Florida has announced his plan to retire at the end of this congressional term, but rumors of an early departure ar...

item.title: Mike Tyson in the 'fight of my life' as he partners with Trump admin in health initiative to tackle obesity
item.description: Mike Tyson joins HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to fight obesity after losing his sister when she was 25 to a heart attack. The boxer said he wan...

item.title: Trump makes good on troop pullout promise, vows return if Democrat city crime worsens
item.description: Thousands of National Guard troops were withdrawn from Los Angeles, Chicago and Portland after Trump's administration deployed them under Title 10 aut...

item.title: Hardline conservatives double down to save the SAVE Act
item.description: The SAVE America Act would mandate identification for voting, in-person citizenship proof for registration and removal of non-citizens from voter roll...
